name: auto-discover-parametrize-fixtures
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: A pytest.mark.parametrize list hardcodes filenames that must be updated manually when new fixtures are added. Use when: (1) a parametrize list enumerates fixture files by name, (2) the test should automatically pick up new files without code changes, (3) fixture files follow a naming pattern (e.g. t*.yaml, *.json).
